clean_archive_release_tests.source: git archive of tested implementation commit

pre_fix_regression.failure: temporary V1 baseline gitignore fixture did not include the new outputs_v2 and outputs_demo release patterns

definition_of_done.requirement: A new public Python GitHub repository can start through one command.
definition_of_done.evidence: agent CLI plus 20 fixed-SHA unfamiliar-repository runs

definition_of_done.requirement: The system selects the next action from current evidence.
LLM Planner participates and has a rule fallback.
definition_of_done.evidence: 14 controlled planner cases, 42 runs, provider/schema/safety fallbacks retained

definition_of_done.requirement: Natural-language terminal interaction supports LLM intent routing and multi-turn sessions.
definition_of_done.evidence: 112 bilingual intent cases, chat-ui, session restore and rule fallback

definition_of_done.requirement: Every executable action comes from Action Registry.
definition_of_done.evidence: planner final registered-action rate 1.0000; unregistered proposal rejection case

definition_of_done.requirement: Patches pass AST, safety and sandbox validation.
definition_of_done.evidence: unified patch gate and controlled Rule/LLM/Hybrid patch evaluation

definition_of_done.requirement: Failures can trigger bounded Reflection and Replan.
Memory changes later planning or patch behavior and records usage evidence.
definition_of_done.evidence: 8 memory cases; completion 0.1250 to 1.0000 and repeated failed patch 1.0000 to 0.0000

definition_of_done.requirement: Unsolvable states emit an accurate blocker instead of fabricated success.
definition_of_done.evidence: clean-repo, environment blocker and Phase 6 partial outcomes

definition_of_done.requirement: At least 20 unfamiliar public repositories are evaluated.
definition_of_done.evidence: 20/20 structured reports at fixed commit SHAs

definition_of_done.requirement: Patch, planner, memory, graph, dynamic, reflection, Top-k and budget ablations are complete.
All existing and new tests pass.
No API keys, caches or unrelated outputs are committed.
README commands are reproducible from a clean source snapshot.
definition_of_done.evidence: git archive without local outputs; 25 release tests passed
phase8_demo_guide_cn.md with live and offline fallback paths

definition_of_done.requirement: Every resume metric is traceable to an experiment artifact.
definition_of_done.evidence: V2 career pack links Phase 6 and Phase 7 JSON/Markdown artifacts

definition_of_done.requirement: The project remains an algorithmic code Agent rather than a fixed workflow or generic chatbot.
definition_of_done.evidence: evidence-fused localization, LLM/hybrid planning, controlled execution, reflection and memory ablations

capability_boundaries: The supported scope is public Python repositories, not every language or private dependency environment.
Twenty unfamiliar repositories all produced static reports, but only seven started and terminated a test process.
Phase 7 LLM patch and planner results use deterministic offline fixtures and are not live-model repair rates.
Graph and dynamic evidence ablations did not improve the current rule-detectable localization benchmark.
No test oracle means no verified-repair claim.
LLM Judge remains advisory; sandbox tests are authoritative.
